title: NaijaFix – Community Issue Reporting Platform
description:
A community issue reporting platform where users can report infrastructure problems such as flooding, overcrowding, and road damage.
Includes authentication, issue tracking, and status updates.

title: Mortgage Calculator
description: A JavaScript app to calculate monthly mortgage payments.

description: A web app that displays country information using an API.

description: A simple app for shortening and saving useful links.

title: Tip calculator

title: Time tracking dashboard
